log: === INITIATIVE ===

=== ROUND 2 ===

Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 30 damage. Kobold — Armored Tank HP: 29/59

Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 20] MISS!
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 20] HIT! 24 damage. Kobold — Armored Tank HP: 5/59
→ Concentration save: [18 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
⚡ Kobold — Armored Tank casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:17 total 27 vs AC 20 — still hits.
--- Kobold — Armored Tank's turn ---
Kobold — Armored Tank casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
→ Kobold — Armored Tank loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
Kobold — Armored Tank casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Kobold — Armored Tank for 6. HP: 11/59
=== ROUND 3 ===

Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 11 damage. Kobold — Armored Tank HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
